project: VoiceInput macOS Core Input UX Hardening

features.name: Sidebar Information Architecture
features.description: Restructure left navigation to Home, Voice Input, Voice Agent, Settings; remove confusing nested classification.
steps: Add home and voiceAgent sections to workspace sidebar enum and rendering
Route each section to dedicated panel view with existing capabilities preserved
Ensure Settings no longer acts as pseudo-home and retains configuration only
features.successCriteria: Sidebar order exactly Home -> Voice Input -> Voice Agent -> Settings and each item is clickable with expected content.
techDocs: macOS Human Interface Guidelines: Designing for macOS

features.name: Style Row Icon Overlap Fix
features.description: Fix edit icon and selected-state icon overlap in style selection rows.
steps: Refactor style row layout from overlap-based container to explicit trailing actions
Reserve stable trailing width to avoid clipping in selected and unselected states
features.successCriteria: Edit icon and selection icon never overlap in all style cards.

features.name: Strict Input Bar Width Adaptation
features.description: Make compact input/status panel width always derived from visible text width with deterministic max-width behavior.
steps: Unify compact width calculation to displayed text rather than raw source text
Keep listening state capped to about 10 Chinese characters viewport while allowing internal text scrolling/truncation strategy
Remove state-specific width jumps caused by long hidden text
features.successCriteria: Panel width changes strictly with visible text; no random long expansion during listening/rewriting transitions.

features.name: Compact Rewriting State Restoration
features.description: Restore rewriting state to compact '改写中' plus progress overlay, never showing full rewritten content during processing.
steps: Change thinking stage entry to pass compact label only
Ensure displayed text resolver for rewriting stage is fixed and short
features.successCriteria: During rewriting, panel shows only short label and progress effect, without long text expansion.

features.name: Injection Reliability and Native Fallback
features.description: Improve focused insertion reliability when permissions are granted by reducing false-negative editability checks and improving paste fallback behavior.
steps: Relax fallback gating so Cmd+V can be attempted when AX direct write fails
Use robust event source for synthetic paste and keep clipboard restoration
Keep no-focus fallback path with explicit user feedback
features.successCriteria: When focused input exists, injection success rate improves and no false 'permission issue' behavior appears in common web/native inputs.
techDocs: Speech authorization and runtime permission flow

features.name: Copy Fallback Popup Lifecycle
features.description: Match intended lifecycle: no auto-hide until copy/close; after copy auto-hide in 3 seconds; close hides immediately.
steps: Add post-copy delayed hide behavior in panel callback path
Ensure fallback popup persists indefinitely when user does not copy
Remove competing transient success/copy hints that break deterministic flow
features.successCriteria: Fallback popup remains until user action; copy causes 3-second auto-hide; close hides immediately.
